common_themes.diagnosis: Lines ending with '1, 2, 7' (in-text citation page markers) are treated as new reference entries by the inline-split logic.

example.what_gt_expected: 1 reference entry: [24] C.-Y. Lee... Deeplysupervised nets. arXiv:1409.5185, 2014.
example.what_script_produced: Script split into many fragments (GT=47 entries → PP=113 entries)
example.root_cause: Trailing page number markers (e.g. ' 1, 2, 7') at end-of-line are parsed as new entry starts by the inline-split regex.

common_themes.diagnosis: Trailing numbers ' 1, 2, 7' cause the author-year detector to think the entry is 'mixed' style.

example.what_script_produced: style=mixed (detected as mixed due to trailing markers)
example.raw_text: [1] Y. Bengio, P. Simard, and P. Frasconi. Learning long-term dependencies... IEEE TNN, 5(2):157–166, 1994.
example.root_cause: Lines have trailing page numbers like '...2017. 1, 2' — the '1, ' part triggers the author-year detection, overriding the numeric prefix.

common_themes.diagnosis: 'Surname, I.:' format — authors_period_title pattern splits on the first period (after author block) rather than the period after the actual title, so 'In: Proceedings of...' becomes the title.

example.what_gt_expected: title="Learning long-term dependencies with gradient descent is difficult"
example.raw_text: [1] Y. Bengio, P. Simard, and P. Frasconi. Learning long-term dependencies... IEEE TNN, 5(2):157–166, 1994.
example.root_cause: Format "Surname, I.:" (LaTeX BibTeX / IEEE style) — the period after authors is parsed as end-of-sentence by authors_period_title pattern, so the actual author block colon and everything after the first period becomes the 'title'.

common_themes.diagnosis: Volume/page numbers like '39(6):1137–1149' contain 4-digit numbers that are picked up as publication years.

example.raw_text: [13] Alireza Fathi, Zbigniew Wojna, Vivek Rathod, Peng Wang, Hyun Oh Song, Sergio Guadarrama, and Kevin Murphy. Semantic instance segmentation via deep metric learning. arXiv preprint arXiv:1703.10277…
example.root_cause: The best candidate pattern (fallback_raw_split) picked year None from trailing text (page markers, volume numbers) rather than the actual publication year 2017.
